PLUTO
FOLLOW YOUR SCRIPT
THE STRAIGHT LINE: A PERFECT SALE
QUESTIONS
YOU HAVE LOST CONTROL OF THE SALE
YOU HAVE LOST CONTROL OF THE SALE
URANUS
BELIEVE ME, YOU WILL
NOT BE SORRY. SOUND
FAIR ENOUGH?
SUPER POWER
PERSUASION
CUSTOMER FOR LIFE
THIS MAKES SENSE AND I
KNOW MY WIFE AND KIDS
WILL BENEFIT TOO.YOU’VE
GOT A DEAL.
EVERY SALE IS A
STRAIGHT LINE
THE PERFECT SCRIPT IS CREATED
FROM THE VERY BEST VERSIONS OF
DIFFERENT PRESENTATIONS.
ENERGY IN = BENEFITS OUT
REMEMBER TO ASK PERMISSION
USE A QUESTION TO HANDLE AN OBJECTION.
“I heart what you’re saying, but let me ask you a question.”
POWERFUL
LANGUAGE
PATTERNS TO CLOSE:
1 If you do even half
as well as the rest
of the people that
have gone through
this program…
2 All I ask if that you
give me one shot...
3 The only problem
you’ll have is I
didn’t call you
six months ago
and get you
started then…
USE THE ART OF LOOPING TO CLOSE AT
THE RIGHT TIME
1 They love your product.
2 They like and trust you.
3 They trust your company.
